name: user-research-for-ai-config
description: Use this skill when the user wants to build a personalized AI configuration through structured self-interview rather than copying templates. Two outputs: (A) Principles document — CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md / CODEX.md / .cursorrules / system-prompt for Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, OpenCode etc. (B) Custom skill package — extracts one of the user's recurring tasks into a reusable SKILL.md with examples and references. AI-driven inference engine: asks about user's actual tasks (not technical architecture), infers right form using Anthropic's 5 official shapes (atomic / orchestration / with-subagents / plugin-with-hooks / composite-plugin) with 6-segment proposal + 5-option feedback. Trigger: 我的 principles / 自己的 skill / 个性化 AI / build my own CLAUDE.md / AI that understands me. Do NOT use for customer research, product discovery, market research.
